survey_vars.name: vm_name
survey_vars.title: VM Name
survey_vars.description: Name of the VM to deploy

survey_vars.name: vm_image
survey_vars.title: VM Image
survey_vars.description: An OCI URL for an Orka VM image

survey_vars.name: public_image
survey_vars.title: Public Image
survey_vars.description: Whether the image URL is publicly accessible. If No, OCI credentials from the environment will be used to pull the image before deploying.

survey_vars.name: cpu
survey_vars.title: CPU Cores
survey_vars.description: Number of CPU cores to allocate

survey_vars.name: memory
survey_vars.title: Memory (MB)
survey_vars.description: Amount of memory in MB to allocate

survey_vars.name: network_interface
survey_vars.title: Network Interface
survey_vars.description: Network interface to use for the VM

survey_vars.name: vm_name
survey_vars.title: VM Name
survey_vars.description: Name of the VM to delete

survey_vars.name: vm_name
survey_vars.title: VM Name
survey_vars.description: Name of the VM to manage (supports partial matches)

survey_vars.name: desired_state
survey_vars.title: Desired State
survey_vars.description: Target VM state

survey_vars.name: vm_name
survey_vars.title: VM Name
survey_vars.description: Filter by VM name (supports partial matches; leave empty to list all)

survey_vars.name: remote_image_name
survey_vars.title: Remote Image Name
survey_vars.description: Name of the image to pull from the registry

survey_vars.name: orka_license_key
survey_vars.title: Orka License Key
survey_vars.description: License key for Orka Engine

survey_vars.name: engine_url
survey_vars.title: Engine URL
survey_vars.description: URL to download the engine package

survey_vars.name: install_android_sdk_force
survey_vars.title: Force Reinstall
survey_vars.description: Force reinstallation of the Android SDK even if already present

survey_vars.name: remote_image_name
survey_vars.title: Remote Image Name
survey_vars.description: OCI URL for the remote image

survey_vars.name: vm_image
survey_vars.title: VM Image
survey_vars.description: Source image to create the VM from

survey_vars.name: vm_name
survey_vars.title: VM Name
survey_vars.description: Name of the VM to push as an image

survey_vars.name: oci_url
survey_vars.title: OCI URL
survey_vars.description: OCI URL for the remote image destination

survey_vars.name: node_name
survey_vars.title: Node Name
survey_vars.description: Filter by node name (leave empty to list images on all nodes)

survey_vars.name: image_name
survey_vars.title: Image Name
survey_vars.description: Name of the image to delete (e.g., orkaSequoia or ghcr.io/org/image:tag)

survey_vars.name: node_name
survey_vars.title: Node Name
survey_vars.description: Name of a specific node to delete from (leave empty to delete from all nodes)

survey_vars.name: platform
survey_vars.title: Android Platform
survey_vars.description: Android platform to install (e.g., android-34, android-35)

survey_vars.name: image_types
survey_vars.title: System Image Types
survey_vars.description: Comma-separated list of system image types (e.g., default,google_apis,google_apis_playstore)

survey_vars.name: platform
survey_vars.title: Android Platform
survey_vars.description: Android platform to uninstall (e.g., android-34, android-35). All system images for this platform will be removed.

templates.name: Create and Run Android Virtual Device

survey_vars.description: Name of the VM where the AVD should be created

survey_vars.description: Android platform to use (e.g., android-34, android-35)

survey_vars.title: System Image Type
survey_vars.description: System image type to use (e.g., default, google_apis)

survey_vars.description: Run AVD after creation

survey_vars.description: Number of CPU cores to allocate

survey_vars.name: memory

survey_vars.description: Amount of memory in MB to allocate

survey_vars.name: avd_index

survey_vars.description: Index of the AVD to delete (e.g., 0 for my-vm-avd-0)

survey_vars.name: vm_name
survey_vars.title: VM Name
survey_vars.description: Name of the VM to provision the user on

survey_vars.description: Username for the new user account
